action_set_definitions.name: get_sector_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current network state for a specific sector, including link utilization, traffic matrix, and global performance metrics like packet loss rate.

action_set_definitions.name: get_link_hardware_limits
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the physical hardware constraints of specific links to determine the maximum possible bandwidth capacity.

link_ids.description: List of link IDs to check.

action_set_definitions.name: query_topology_for_alternatives
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the network topology to find alternative paths between two nodes that have available headroom. Used to verify path existence before rerouting.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_capacity_upgrade
action_set_definitions.description: Increases the logical or provisioned bandwidth of a link up to its physical hardware limit.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_traffic_reroute
action_set_definitions.description: Reconfigures routing tables to move a specific traffic volume to a verified alternative path.

state_description.nodes: List of active network nodes (routers/switches) and their operational status.
state_description.links: List of physical or logical connections between nodes, including source, target, current_bandwidth_gbps, and current_utilization_percentage.
state_description.traffic_matrix: A mapping of source-destination pairs to their current traffic demand in Gbps.
state_description.network_metrics: Global performance indicators such as average_latency_ms, total_packet_loss_rate, and network_throughput_gbps.
